testcase.name: test_sevenRoll_discardsCardsWhenOver7(Path)
testcase.system-out:
=== START GAME === Max Rounds: 10
=== Initial Placement Phase === Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 36 Player 1: Placed initial road between 36 and 37 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 7 Player 2: Placed initial road between 6 and 7 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 9 Player 3: Placed initial road between 9 and 10 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 28 Player 4: Placed initial road between 27 and 28 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 16 Player 4: Placed initial road between 16 and 17 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 49 Player 3: Placed initial road between 48 and 49 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 52 Player 2: Placed initial road between 52 and 23 Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 2 Player 1: Placed initial road between 1 and 2
****** A 7 was rolled... Robber activates.... Player 1 discarded 5 cards. Player 2 discarded 6 cards. Player 3 discarded 5 cards. Player 4 discarded 6 cards. Player 1 moved robber to tile 15 No players to steal from. 1 / 1: Passed ****** A 7 was rolled... Robber activates.... Player 2 moved robber to tile 8 Player 2 stole 1 WOOD from Player 4 1 / 2: Passed ****** A 7 was rolled... Robber activates.... Player 3 moved robber to tile 10 No players to steal from. 1 / 3: Passed ****** A 7 was rolled... Robber activates.... Player 4 moved robber to tile 6 Player 4 stole 1 WOOD from Player 1 1 / 4: Built road between 41 and 16

Player 2 moved robber to tile 5 Player 2 stole 1 ORE from Player 3 1 / 2: Passed ****** A 7 was rolled... Robber activates.... Player 3 moved robber to tile 15 No players to steal from. 1 / 3: Passed ****** A 7 was rolled... Robber activates.... Player 4 moved robber to tile 17 Player 4 stole 1 WHEAT from Player 1 1 / 4: Passed

=== Initial Placement Phase === Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 52 Player 1: Placed initial road between 51 and 52 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 15 Player 2: Placed initial road between 15 and 13 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 30 Player 3: Placed initial road between 30 and 31 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 36 Player 4: Placed initial road between 34 and 36 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 9 Player 4: Placed initial road between 8 and 9 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 19 Player 3: Placed initial road between 44 and 19 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 11 Player 2: Placed initial road between 10 and 11 Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 39 Player 1: Placed initial road between 35 and 39
1 / 1: Passed 1 / 2: Built road between 9 and 10 1 / 3: Passed 1 / 4: Passed -----Round 1 ---- Player 1 VP: 0 Player 2 VP: 2 Player 3 VP: 2 Player 4 VP: 2 ****** A 7 was rolled... Robber activates.... Player 1 moved robber to tile 6 No players to steal from. 2 / 1: Passed ****** A 7 was rolled... Robber activates.... Player 2 moved robber to tile 16 No players to steal from. 2 / 2: Passed 2 / 3: Passed 2 / 4: Passed -----Round 2 ---- Player 1 VP: 0 Player 2 VP: 2 Player 3 VP: 2 Player 4 VP: 2 3 / 1: Passed 3 / 2: Passed 3 / 3: Built road between 19 and 20 3 / 4: Passed -----Round 3 ---- Player 1 VP: 0 Player 2 VP: 2 Player 3 VP: 2 Player 4 VP: 2 === GAME OVER (Round 4) === No player reached the points needed to win.

testcase.name: test_gameTerminates_whenPlayerReachesWinThreshold(Path)
testcase.system-out:
=== START GAME === Max Rounds: 10
=== Initial Placement Phase === Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 44 Player 1: Placed initial road between 43 and 44 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 23 Player 2: Placed initial road between 23 and 6 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 31 Player 3: Placed initial road between 30 and 31 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 49 Player 4: Placed initial road between 48 and 49 Player 4: Placed initial settlement at intersection 46 Player 4: Placed initial road between 45 and 46 Player 3: Placed initial settlement at intersection 34 Player 3: Placed initial road between 34 and 36 Player 2: Placed initial settlement at intersection 42 Player 2: Placed initial road between 38 and 42 Player 1: Placed initial settlement at intersection 12 Player 1: Placed initial road between 12 and 4
1 / 1: Passed 1 / 2: Passed 1 / 3: Passed 1 / 4: Passed -----Round 1 ---- Player 1 VP: 8 Player 2 VP: 2 Player 3 VP: 2 Player 4 VP: 2 2 / 1: Passed 2 / 2: Passed 2 / 3: Passed 2 / 4: Passed -----Round 2 ---- Player 1 VP: 8 Player 2 VP: 2 Player 3 VP: 2 Player 4 VP: 2 3 / 1: Passed 3 / 2: Passed 3 / 3: Passed 3 / 4: Passed -----Round 3 ---- Player 1 VP: 8 Player 2 VP: 2 Player 3 VP: 2 Player 4 VP: 2 4 / 1: Passed 4 / 2: Passed 4 / 3: Passed 4 / 4: Passed -----Round 4 ---- Player 1 VP: 8 Player 2 VP: 2 Player 3 VP: 2 Player 4 VP: 2 5 / 1: Passed 5 / 2: Passed 5 / 3: Passed 5 / 4: Passed -----Round 5 ---- Player 1 VP: 8 Player 2 VP: 2 Player 3 VP: 2 Player 4 VP: 2 6 / 1: Passed 6 / 2: Passed 6 / 3: Passed 6 / 4: Passed -----Round 6 ---- Player 1 VP: 8 Player 2 VP: 2 Player 3 VP: 2 Player 4 VP: 2 7 / 1: Passed 7 / 2: Passed 7 / 3: Passed 7 / 4: Passed -----Round 7 ---- Player 1 VP: 8 Player 2 VP: 2 Player 3 VP: 2 Player 4 VP: 2 8 / 1: Passed 8 / 2: Passed 8 / 3: Passed 8 / 4: Passed -----Round 8 ---- Player 1 VP: 8 Player 2 VP: 2 Player 3 VP: 2 Player 4 VP: 2 9 / 1: Passed 9 / 2: Passed 9 / 3: Passed 9 / 4: Passed -----Round 9 ---- Player 1 VP: 8 Player 2 VP: 2 Player 3 VP: 2 Player 4 VP: 2 10 / 1: Passed 10 / 2: Passed 10 / 3: Passed 10 / 4: Passed -----Round 10 ---- Player 1 VP: 8 Player 2 VP: 2 Player 3 VP: 2 Player 4 VP: 2 === GAME OVER (Round 11) === No player reached the points needed to win.
